creator: tijl@FreeBSD.org
text: test-time tests whether time() and gettimeofday() are consistent.  time() is implemented using clock_gettime(CLOCK_SECOND,...) and the man page for clock_gettime says CLOCK_SECOND "returns the current second without performing a full time counter query, using an in-kernel cached value of the current second," which means this test may fail sporadically.  Maybe the test should be skipped on FreeBSD.
